properties.name: Dahlonega Main Entrance
properties.subtitle: adjacent to Cottrell Center and Military leadership Center
properties.description: Primary vehicle and pedestrian entrance to the Dahlonega campus. Visitor parking and information available nearby.

properties.name: Stewart Center
properties.subtitle: Student Services Hub
properties.description: Home to student services, advising, and administrative offices. Centrally located on the Dahlonega campus.

properties.name: Dining Hall
properties.subtitle: Main Dining Facility
properties.description: Main dining facility on the Dahlonega campus

properties.name: Walkway of Service
properties.subtitle: Commemorative Brick Walkway
properties.description: Commemorative brick walkway honoring UNG faculty & staff retirees. Interactive map available at the Facilities GIS Hub.

properties.name: Parking Lot A
properties.subtitle: Visitor & General Parking
properties.description: Primary visitor parking on the Dahlonega campus. Permit required in designated areas. Visitor spaces marked in blue.
properties.parking: Visitor spaces available — no permit required before 4pm

properties.name: Gainesville Main Entrance
properties.subtitle: Mundy Mill Road
properties.description: Primary entrance to the Gainesville campus. Visitor information and parking directions available at the gatehouse.
properties.parking: Visitor lot — straight ahead at entrance

properties.name: Nesbitt Building
properties.subtitle: Academic & Administrative
properties.description: Houses academic programs and administrative offices for the Gainesville campus. Main lobby information desk on the ground floor.

properties.name: Walkway of Service
properties.subtitle: Commemorative Brick Walkway
properties.description: Commemorative brick walkway honoring UNG alumni, veterans, and service members. Interactive map available at the Facilities GIS Hub.

properties.name: Parking Lot G1
properties.subtitle: Primary Visitor Parking
properties.description: Primary visitor and student parking on the Gainesville campus. Accessible spaces near the main building entrances.
properties.parking: Visitor spaces — rows 1–3, no permit required

properties.name: Cumming Campus Entrance
properties.subtitle: Tribble Gap Road
properties.description: Main entrance to the UNG Cumming campus. Visitor parking is available directly inside the entrance on the right.
properties.parking: Visitor parking — first right after entrance

properties.name: Cumming Main Building
properties.subtitle: Academic & Student Services
properties.description: Primary academic and student services building on the Cumming campus. Advisors and faculty offices located inside.

properties.name: Blue Ridge Campus Entrance
properties.subtitle: Windy Ridge Road
properties.description: Main entrance to the UNG Blue Ridge campus. A small but fully equipped campus serving the north Georgia mountain region.
properties.parking: Surface lot — adjacent to main building

properties.name: Blue Ridge Academic Building
properties.subtitle: Classrooms & Faculty Offices
properties.description: Primary academic building on the Blue Ridge campus. Houses classrooms, faculty offices, and student support services.

properties.name: Ralston Hall
properties.subtitle: University College — Specialized Labs
properties.description: Home to University College programs at Blue Ridge, including specialized simulation and discipline lab spaces.

properties.name: Oconee Campus Entrance
properties.subtitle: Experiment Station Road
properties.description: Main entrance to the UNG Oconee campus serving the Athens-area region. Visitor parking is available near the main building.
properties.parking: Surface lot — adjacent to main entrance

properties.name: Oconee Main Building
properties.subtitle: Academic & Student Services
properties.description: Primary academic and administrative building on the Oconee campus. Student services, advising, and faculty offices located inside.
